Hello,

reviews.review_title: Great video player for VR content
reviews.review_description: This is a great video player for both regular and VR videos with support for local content as well as the supported websites for streaming videos.

developer_response.body:
Hi,

Thank you very much for your great feedback! We are always working on improving our app according to the user needs.

reviews.review_description: Do you have a list of compatible websites? Any way you guys can build a browser integrated module that would play WebXR? Is it possible to also build a feature that will allow to play video over the network like MoonVr. That would surely put you over the competition!

developer_response.body:
We are very happy to hear that you enjoy our App, we put a lot of work and thought into how to make it easy to use and we will add more amazing features in the future, we value your honest feedback, and stay tuned for more updates! ;)

In regards to a list of sites, we don't have that but we are going to put an API track whenever a website will use our API tool then it will add him to a special Menu that you can view and see which sites are currently using PLAY'A.

I am not sure about webxr, that might be tricky but we will check on that, thank you for your suggestion.

reviews.review_description: At least this is better than the original Player

developer_response.body: Hello. Thank you for using PLAY'A, we are glad to hear that you have a good experience with us. We very much value your feedback.

reviews.review_title: Can’t get 8k to download on my Quest 2
reviews.review_description:
I’d easily give this 5 stars if I could only download into my Quest 2. Maybe I’m missing something but when I click to download a movie, only 4K shows as the highest option. 

Any help?

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for reaching out to us and for using PLAY'A, you are probably speaking of a specific website that allows only 4k quality on the app, many websites use our API in order to work with our app. The Oculus quest 2 should be able to play up to 8K resolution, it might be the website itself that does not have that feature on the app, please contact them and I am sure that they will assist you.

We hope to get the 5* from you in the future!

reviews.review_description: Its a great app! Shame i cant find it on my Quest 2. Seems its not aproved yet?.

developer_response.body:
Hey,

Thank you for reaching out to us and for using PLAY'A, the Quest 2 works great with the PLAY'A App.

Please go to the following link from your Oculus Quest and download https://www.oculus.com/experiences/quest/3447691518693868/

You can also go to www.playavr.com from the quest browser and pick the Quest headset and then it will take you to the download.

You need to swipe a bit to the right side of the list of devices.

Let us know if that works for you.

reviews.review_description: wow its so good

developer_response.body: Hello. Thank you for using PLAY'A, we are glad to hear that you have a good experience with us. We very much value your feedback.

reviews.review_description: it doesnt connect to 99% adult vr sites. only to vrb***ngers. so the developers sold out. DO NOt download this app. will not connect to adult vr. tjis company is dishonest

developer_response.body:
Hi. Thank you for giving PLAY'A a chance.

PLAY'A is not meant to be used for adult sites. Main purpose is playback of files stored on your computer. However we do have an option to connect to some sites and bring their videos to PLAY'A.

API to connect to PLAY'A is public and any website can use it to optimize their site to work with PLAY'A. If you wish your favorite site to be added to PLAY'A please contact their owners. You can also write to us at support@playavr.com and we will talk to website developers.

reviews.review_description: I'm having problem playing 5k and 6k videos when I try to play them on my Gear vr, it's just says something went wrong. Please fix

developer_response.body: Dear user. I am very sorry that you are experiencing issues with PLAY'A. Most likely your mobile phone is not capable of playing 6K and 5K videos. Samsung Galaxy s10 and some of s8, s9 models that are sold in European market are capable of playing 5K and 6K videos.

reviews.review_description:
This is the app to use if you subscribe to VRbangers and you want to stream their videos. That is its only positive.

Negatives: 1. When the app first loads, it is on a fixed orientation assuming you are sitting up. You cannot change this. And if you are lying down it's practically impossible to see the relevant site login settings on the bottom right, you crank your neck practically out of the socket just to see it. It needs to be free/changable orientation for people lying down.

2. While it claims you can. I cannot login to MilfVR or W**nkzVR. The reason why is they need a username to login and this only allows you to login via email. Putting in my correct email and password for those sites simply gets me incorrect login details error. Trying to login with username and password the same.

3. It does not let you select performers from the app. Meaning you need to go onto the website to find out who they are and watch anything else from them.

4. You cannot change orientation with the Oculus wand like you can in Skybox. You have to mess around selecting tilt. And it assumes you are sitting up again on each video starting so that option to select tilt is not easy to see too.

Fix the orientation issues and site login and it would be better.

developer_response.body: Hi, Thank you for using PLAY'A, our app is used on different websites each website has it's own rules and features, we try our best to fit it to everyone per their request, we take your feedback and changes under consideration, thank you.

reviews.review_description:
This app is great, I like the options it gives. Clearly no player is perfect at this point. I do wish it'd support more websites as the interface is convenient. I agree with some posters that it would be great to have a quickset tilt option (vertically), or at least the option to save these settings for the current session rather than just one video (ideally one could set up different profiles). 

One question I do have and have not found anything about is, using Go, I try to capture screenshots the usual way (and it snaps it audibly), but the images are not in the screenshots or any folder as far as I see. Am I missing something? Where do screen/video captures go? Thanks.

developer_response.body:
Hello,

Thank you for using PLAY'A that is a very interesting idea about the tilts. We will think about how to implement it and we will include it in the next releases. regarding screenshots. this might be an oculus go problem. we do not restrict screenshots and oculus go uses its own tools for the screenshot.

reviews.review_description: worked fine for a bit, completely broken now. just spins in update queued. other apps update fine.

developer_response.body:
Hey,
Thank you for your feedback, we would like to inform you that we made a lot of interesting changes that will help you enjoy our app, we hope that you will give it another chance and have a new review.

reviews.review_description: When will this app be updated for the Oculus Go???? To version 1.6 like the rift???

developer_response.body:
Hello,
This version is currently only for the Rift + Quest 2 as they are the only headsets that can run the 8K videos, if you will try to do that on the Go then it will get stuck or slow the device to a stop.

reviews.review_description: Hi, I tried to open several websites including google.com but it always says bad request. Is there any specific site that we should try. Thanks

developer_response.body:
Hey,
Thank you for your feedback, we apologies to hear that you are having an error with the App, a clean reinstall should solve the problem, adding a website should work for you, there are specific websites that works with our App.
